# Clínica Hispana Cruz #3 - Houston, TX

## About
Clínica Hispana Cruz #3 is a Hispanic medical clinic located in Houston, Texas. We provide professional healthcare services 100% in Spanish for the Hispanic community.

## Location
- Address: 5411 S Braeswood Blvd, Houston, TX 77096
- Phone: (832) 323-2330
- Email: clinicahcruz3@gmail.com

## Hours
- Monday - Sunday: 9:00 AM - 9:00 PM

## Services
We offer comprehensive medical services including:

### General Medicine
- Diabetes, Hypertension & Cholesterol Care (/services/condiciones-cronicas)
- Thyroid Testing & Treatment (/services/tiroides)
- Allergy Testing & Treatment (/services/alergias)
- Flu & COVID Testing and Respiratory Illness Care (/services/enfermedades-respiratorias)
- Men's Health Exams: PSA & Testosterone (/services/salud-hombre)

### Women's Health
- Gynecology Care: Pap Smear & Cultures (/services/ginecologia)
- Pregnancy Testing & Confirmation (/services/prueba-embarazo)
- Contraceptive Methods (/services/anticonceptivos)
- Subdermal Implant Removal (/services/extraccion-implantes)

### Exams & Certificates
- School & Sports Physical Exams (/services/examen-fisico-escolar)
- Alcohol & Drug Testing (/services/examen-alcohol-drogas)
- DOT Physical Exam - CDL License (/services/examen-dot)
- Immigration Medical Exam I-693 (/services/examenes-inmigracion)

### Lab & Testing
- Blood Tests | Lab (/services/examenes-sangre)
- Stool Tests (/services/examen-heces)
- Strep Test (/services/prueba-strep)
- Tuberculosis (TB) Test (/services/prueba-tuberculosis)
- Sexually Transmitted Disease (STD) Testing (/services/enfermedades-transmision-sexual)
- Electrocardiogram (EKG) (/services/electrocardiograma)
- Ultrasound & Sonography (/services/ultrasonido)

### Treatments
- Urinalysis & Urinary Infection Treatment (/services/infecciones-urinarias)
- Flu and Tetanus (Tdap) Vaccines (/services/vacunas)
- Vitamin IV Therapy (/services/sueros-vitaminados)
- Wound Suturing (/services/suturas-heridas)
- Wound Care (/services/curacion-heridas)
- Minor Surgery (/services/cirugias-menores)
- Abscess Drainage (/services/drenaje-abscesos)
- Ingrown Toenail Removal (/services/unas-encarnadas)
- Pharmacy (/services/farmacia)

## Languages
- Spanish (Primary)
- English

## Payment
No insurance required. We offer affordable, transparent self-pay pricing and accept cash and cards. Uninsured patients welcome.

## Website
https://clinicahispanacruz3.com

## Contact
For appointments or questions, call (832) 323-2330 or visit our clinic. Walk-ins welcome.
